---
title: "Quiz 6 — Two-Way ANOVA & Interaction"
---

These questions check **two-way ANOVA** — two categorical factors, their main effects,
and the **interaction** between them — read through the regression model
$\hat{y} = b_0 + b_1 A + b_2 B + b_3 AB$ and the associated $F$-tests. They mirror
**Homework 6** and draw on **Chapter 5** of the Lecture Notes.

Answer each question and press **Check** for instant, explained feedback. Your score
and progress are saved in this browser; press **Reset quiz** to start over.

```{=html}
<div class="quizbank" data-bank="../assets/banks/quiz6.json" data-show-title="false"></div>
<script type="module" src="../assets/quiz-engine.js"></script>
```
